parameters.query:
UPDATE document_sequences
SET last_number = last_number + 1,
    updated_at  = NOW()
WHERE document_type = 'nda'
  AND year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())::int
RETURNING
  prefix || '-' || year::text || '-' || LPAD(last_number::text, 3, '0') AS document_number;

SELECT
  COALESCE(c.id::text, l.id::text)                                   AS client_uuid,
  COALESCE(c.company_name, c.full_name, c.name,
           l.company_name, l.business_name, l.full_name, '')          AS client_company_name,
  COALESCE(c.contact_name, c.full_name,
           l.contact_name, l.full_name, '')                           AS client_contact_name,
  COALESCE(c.street, c.address_street, l.street, l.address, '')       AS client_street,
  COALESCE(c.zip, c.postal_code, l.zip, l.postal_code, '')            AS client_zip,
  COALESCE(c.city, l.city, '')                                         AS client_city,
  COALESCE(c.country, l.country, 'Deutschland')                        AS client_country
FROM
  (SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = NULLIF('{{customer_id}}', '')::uuid LIMIT 1) c
  FULL OUTER JOIN
  (SELECT * FROM leads WHERE id = NULLIF('{{lead_id}}', '')::uuid LIMIT 1) l
  ON FALSE
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO documents (
  document_number,
  document_type,
  title,
  language,
  status,
  customer_id,
  lead_id,
  currency,
  file_format,
  mime_type,
  generated_by,
  tags,
  expires_at,
  notes
)
VALUES (
  '{{document_number}}',
  'nda',
  'Geheimhaltungsvereinbarung {{document_number}}',
  '{{language}}',
  'draft',
  NULLIF('{{customer_id}}', '')::uuid,
  NULLIF('{{lead_id}}', '')::uuid,
  'EUR',
  'pdf',
  'application/pdf',
  'GENERATE-nda',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'template_key',           'nda_template',
    'nda_type',               '{{nda_type}}',
    'purpose',                '{{purpose}}',
    'confidential_info',      '{{confidential_info}}',
    'duration_months',        '{{duration_months}}',
    'governing_law',          '{{governing_law}}'
  ),
  CASE
    WHEN '{{duration_months}}' ~ '^d+$'
    THEN NOW() + ('{{duration_months}}' || ' months')::interval
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  NULLIF('{{notes}}', '')
)
RETURNING
  id::text        AS document_id,
  document_number,
  status,
  expires_at::date::text AS valid_until;

fields.name: next_step
fields.value: POST document_id + variables to PDF renderer → upload to ndas/YEAR/document_number.pdf → UPDATE documents

parameters.noteText:
GENERATE-nda — Creates a numbered NDA record

CLIENT (provide ONE):
  customer_id    UUID   from customers table (leave "" for lead)
  lead_id        UUID   from leads table     (leave "" for customer)

REQUIRED INPUTS:
  language          TEXT   de / en
  nda_type          TEXT   mutual / one-way
  purpose           TEXT   e.g. "Evaluation of AI automation services"
  confidential_info TEXT   what information is covered
  governing_law     TEXT   e.g. "Deutsches Recht / German law"

OPTIONAL:
  duration_months   TEXT   integer e.g. "24" — leave "" for indefinite
  notes             TEXT   internal notes

OUTPUT:
  document_number   DEE-NDA-2026-001
  document_id       UUID of the documents record
  valid_until       NOW() + duration_months (NULL if indefinite)
  status            draft

NDA TYPES:
  mutual   — both parties keep each other's info confidential
  one-way  — only receiving party has confidentiality obligation

AFTER NDA IS SIGNED:
  UPDATE documents
  SET status    = 'signed',
      signed_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = '{{document_id}}'::uuid

GENERATE-nda — 4-step pipeline

Step 1 — DB: Assign NDA number
  UPDATE document_sequences (atomic)
  → document_number = DEE-NDA-2026-001

Step 2 — DB: Get client details
  FULL OUTER JOIN: works for leads AND customers.
  Provide customer_id OR lead_id (or both).
  → client_company_name, client_contact_name, address

Step 3 — DB: Create draft NDA record
  expires_at = NOW() + duration_months
    OR NULL if duration_months is blank (indefinite NDA)
  tags JSONB stores: nda_type, purpose,
    confidential_info, duration, governing_law
  → document_id, document_number, valid_until

Step 4 — SET: Output for PDF renderer

── DOCUMENT LIFECYCLE ────────────────────────────────────
  draft    → generated, not yet sent
  sent     → sent to client for review/signature
  signed   → both parties signed (set signed_at = NOW())
  archived → NDA expired or superseded

── TYPICAL FLOW ─────────────────────────────────────────
  1. GENERATE-nda (this pipeline)
  2. Send PDF to client
  3. Client signs → UPDATE documents SET status='signed'
  4. GENERATE-proposal (now safe to share details)
  5. GENERATE-contract (after proposal accepted)

nda_template — all {{variables}} needed

Document info:
  nda_number          DEE-NDA-2026-001
  nda_date            08.06.2026
  valid_until         08.06.2028  (if 24 months) / indefinite
  nda_type            mutual / one-way

Disclosing party (always Dee Empire):
  de_company_name     Dee Empire UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
  de_street           [from company settings]
  de_city             [from company settings]
  de_representative   Mohamed Sesay

Receiving party (from customers or leads):
  client_company_name
  client_contact_name
  client_street / client_zip / client_city / client_country

NDA content:
  purpose             reason for information exchange
  confidential_info   description of confidential information
  governing_law       e.g. "Deutsches Recht"
  duration_months     e.g. "24" or "indefinite"

Storage path after upload:
  storage_key    ndas/2026/DEE-NDA-2026-001.pdf
  storage_bucket crowpus-docs-bucket
